title: AI API Costs Are Skyrocketing! Get Ready for the SHOCK! #shorts
summary: The price of AI APIs is increasing, prompting businesses to reconsider their approach. Using tools like Claude's Artifacts as internal SaaS is presented as a cost management strategy to sustain innovation.
writeup: This short argues that rising AI API prices are pushing businesses to rethink how they build and pay for AI features. The proposed response: treat tools like Claude's Artifacts as internal SaaS, using them to manage costs while continuing to ship new capabilities. The takeaway is a cost-optimization framing in which pricing pressure becomes a reason to consolidate work into reusable internal tooling rather than scaling external API spend.
